Description: Structural Engineer — crane support structure design (runway beams; corbel/column details; connections; end stops; load analysis; seismic design; deflection checks)
BIM Technician — crane support structure drawing production (framing plan; beam sections; support details; connection details; rail/end stop details; design notes sheet)
Project Manager — coordination and oversight (County preliminary review; interdisciplinary coordination; drawing issue)
Cost Estimator — quantity takeoff and benchmarking support for crane support scope
SourceSection: Steps 1-2 — design load establishment and cost input

Description: Internal design review and QA/QC check of calculations and drawings
Notes: Allowance for internal peer review; hours embedded in Structural Engineer and PM time

Description: Interdisciplinary coordination (electrical DEL-004 crane power; architectural DEL-001 clearances; PKG-016 crane supplier data)
Notes: Coordination effort embedded in Structural Engineer and PM hours

Description: County preliminary design review submission (crane support approach within DEL-002-01)
Notes: Effort embedded in PM and Structural Engineer hours; no separate cost

Description: P.Eng. stamp and IFC issuance (final review; stamp; distribution)
SourceSection: Step 7 — P.Eng. stamp and IFC issue
Notes: Included in Structural Engineer hours; no separate external cost
